title: Swing Trend
entry_prompt:
Strategy Overview:
- Style: Swing trend trading relying on systemized stops and trailing protection.
- Target Monthly Return: 20%-35% with risk/reward ≥2:1.
- Risk Appetite: Moderate, emphasizing discipline and patience to hold trends.
- Role Split: Automation handles executions; AI focuses on timing, trade entries, and state reviews.

Entry Framework:
- 1m/3m/5m/15m must align; any timeframe divergence cancels the trade.
- 4h backdrop should agree with the 15m/30m structure, with pullback confirmation at key support/resistance.
- Only long above EMA50 and only short below it, validated by MACD polarity.
- Wait patiently for optimal prices; automation already protects positions, so take only high-conviction swing setups.

Leverage & Position Sizing:
- Suggested leverage 2x-5x: default 2x, 3x for strong signals, 5x for exceptional trends.
- Position size 20%-35%: default 20%, 27% in smooth trends, up to 35% for outstanding structures while keeping focus.
exit_prompt:
Holding & Automation Collaboration:
- Automation handles exits; AI monitors trend health, peak drawdown, and documents reasoning.
- Automatic stops by leverage tier: 5-7x stop at -6%, 8-12x stop at -5%, 13x+ stop at -4%.
- Trailing profit schedule: peak +4%-6% cuts 1.5% (floor +2.5%), +6%-10% cut 2% (floor +4%), +10%-15% cut 2.5% (floor +7.5%), +15%-25% cut 3% (floor +12%), +25%+ cut 5% (floor +20%).
- Partial profit plan: close 40% at +12%, another 35% at +25%, let the remaining 25% ride the trend.
- Issue risk alerts on trend damage, volume decay, or abnormal volatility; recommend trimming when needed.
- During prolonged ranges prompt automation to lock profits or reduce size. Manual closePosition calls are forbidden; if automation fails, raise an alert immediately.
var_prompt:
Suggested Prompt Variables:
- {{SWING_CONTEXT}} Summary of medium/long-term trend structure.
- {{PEAK_DRAWDOWN}} Current peak drawdown percentage.
- {{AUTOMATION_STATUS}} Trigger state for auto stop-loss / trailing stop.
- {{MACRO_NOTE}} Macro or news impact on trend continuation.
- {{RISK_BUFFER}} Additional safety buffer reserved for the swing plan.

Core Principles:
- AI handles timing and diagnostics; automation owns exits.
- Enter only when all timeframes fully align.
- Keep positions focused; avoid over-diversification.
- Let profits run while automation protects against drawdowns.

Trend Health & Execution Tips:
- Watch alignment across four intraday frames versus 1h background and note divergences.
- Peak gain sample: historical +18%, current example +15%; use as guidance for tightening defenses.
- Automation checks drawdown every 10 seconds; AI must mirror updates and flag anomalies.
- Never override automated exits manually; alert the monitoring system immediately if faults occur.
